errors.networkFailed: Unable to connect to the FHIR Server. Please check the server URL and network connection.
errors.fhirDuplicate: This data already exists on the FHIR Server, and the server rejected creating a duplicate resource.
errors.fhirValidation: FHIR Server validation failed. Please verify that the submitted fields match the expected format.
errors.fhirForbidden: The FHIR Server rejected this operation. Please verify server permissions or configuration.
errors.fhirNotFound: The FHIR Server could not find the referenced resource. Please verify the submitted references.
errors.fhirRequestFailed: The FHIR Server returned an error ({{status}}). Please review the input and expand the raw error if needed.

feedbackReason.label: Explain this result
feedbackReason.created: This is shown in green because the app did not find a reusable existing {{resourceType}}, so it created a new resource with POST.
feedbackReason.updated: This is shown in green because this step already had an existing {{resourceType}} ID, so the app updated the same resource with PUT.
feedbackReason.reused: This is shown in blue because the app found a reusable existing {{resourceType}} and reused it to avoid creating a duplicate. Reuse does not automatically rewrite the existing server-side text to match the current locale; submit again to update that existing resource with PUT if needed.

errors.unavailable: Local file import/export is not available in the current environment.
errors.invalidJson: Import failed: the selected file is not valid JSON.
errors.invalidBundle: Import failed: the selected file is not a FHIR Bundle JSON document.
errors.invalidSummary: Import failed: this Bundle does not contain enough data to build a usable summary.

welcome.title: Welcome to RxFHIR
welcome.description: RxFHIR is a desktop app for building, querying, and teaching FHIR-based prescription workflows.

bullets.creator: Creator: build prescription-related Resources step by step and assemble the final Document Bundle.
bullets.consumer: Consumer: query, import, and inspect Bundle results and prescription summaries.
bullets.settings: Settings: adjust the FHIR Server, shortcuts, and accessibility preferences.

creator.title: Start with Creator first
creator.description: For most first-time sessions, the Creator flow is the fastest way to understand how the whole prescription workflow fits together.

bullets.stepper: The 11-step flow connects organization, patient, practitioner, prescription, and final document assembly.
bullets.templates: Use Prescription Templates, Fill Mock, or Live Demo to see a complete result faster.
bullets.draft: Unfinished work is auto-saved locally so you can continue later.

consumer.title: Consumer is for query and verification
consumer.description: After submitting a Bundle, switch to Consumer to search results, inspect JSON, or open a local Bundle file.

bullets.search: Basic, Date, and Complex search modes are all available.
bullets.helpers: Query Helpers keeps recent submissions, saved searches, and example queries close at hand.
bullets.detail: The detail pane can switch between Structured and JSON views for learning and debugging.

settings.title: Settings makes daily use smoother
settings.description: Server selection, shortcuts, zoom, and motion preferences can all be adjusted to match your workflow.

bullets.server: Start by checking that the FHIR Server URL and connection status are correct.
bullets.shortcuts: The shortcut page shows active bindings and lets you customize common actions.
bullets.accessibility: Text scale, interface zoom, focus style, and reduced motion can all be tuned here.

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Search pages and common actions without memorizing every shortcut first.
commandPalette.placeholder: Search Creator, Consumer, toggle theme, shortcut help…
commandPalette.empty: No matching command is available right now.

activityCenter.label: Open Activity Center
activityCenter.description: Review recent success, warning, and error notifications.

onboarding.label: Open Quick Start
onboarding.description: Reopen the product tour and main workflow entry points.

quickStart.label: Open Quick Start Tasks
quickStart.description: Launch guided demo tasks for prescription creation, query, and settings.

openRecentBundle.description: Open a recently used local Bundle: {{fileName}}

shortcutHelp.label: Open shortcut help
shortcutHelp.description: Review all currently available keyboard shortcuts.

toggleTheme.label: Toggle theme
toggleTheme.description: Cycle between light, dark, and system themes.

toggleLocale.label: Toggle locale
toggleLocale.description: Switch between Traditional Chinese and English.

openTemplates.label: Open prescription templates
openTemplates.description: Quickly apply common prescription scenarios or teaching presets.

startLiveDemo.label: Start Live Demo
startLiveDemo.description: Run the guided walkthrough for the full prescription flow.

toggleInspector.label: Toggle right panel
toggleInspector.description: Open or close the Creator JSON / Request inspector panel.

toggleInspectorMode.label: Switch panel mode
toggleInspectorMode.description: Switch between JSON and FHIR Request views.

focusSearch.label: Focus search field
focusSearch.description: Move focus to the main Consumer search input.

importBundle.label: Import Bundle JSON
importBundle.description: Import a local FHIR Bundle JSON file.

testConnection.label: Test FHIR connection
testConnection.description: Check whether the current FHIR Server in Settings is reachable.

saveSettings.label: Save settings
saveSettings.description: Save the current changes on the Settings page.

openShortcutSettings.label: Open shortcut settings
openShortcutSettings.description: Switch to the Shortcuts tab in Settings.

openAccessibilitySettings.label: Open accessibility settings
openAccessibilitySettings.description: Switch to the Accessibility tab in Settings.

activityCenter.title: Activity Center
activityCenter.description: Review recent operation feedback and notification history in one place.
activityCenter.empty: No notifications have been recorded yet.
activityCenter.emptyFiltered: No notifications match the {{filter}} filter right now.

quickStart.title: Quick Start Tasks
quickStart.description: Launch a runnable demo task directly instead of figuring out where to begin on your own.

creator-primary-template.title: Build your first demo prescription
creator-primary-template.description: Move Creator into a ready-to-use demo scenario so you can understand the full creation flow faster.

bullets.1: If Creator is empty, the primary demo template will be loaded right away.
bullets.2: If Creator already has work, the template panel will open instead of overwriting it directly.
bullets.3: You can then submit each step and assemble the final Document Bundle.

consumer-example-query.title: Load your first example query
consumer-example-query.description: Move Consumer into a ready-made example query so the search workspace is easier to understand.

bullets.1: This opens Consumer and fills a basic query example.
bullets.2: You can review the conditions on the left before searching or refining them.
bullets.3: It is a good way to understand the search flow after a Bundle has been created.

settings-accessibility.title: Tune readability and interaction comfort
settings-accessibility.description: Open Settings directly in the accessibility section and adjust zoom, motion, and focus to a comfortable baseline.

bullets.1: This switches Settings directly to the Accessibility tab.
bullets.2: You can quickly adjust text scale, interface zoom, focus style, and motion behavior.
bullets.3: It is useful before your first session so the desktop experience feels right.

jsonViewer.noSummary: No readable summary is available for this content. Switch to the raw JSON view instead.
